name: glamour-pro
description: Glamour PRO theme build tooling. Run 'npm install' once from this directory, then use the commands below.

scripts-info.dev: Development: starts preview server (http://localhost:3060) + JS watcher in parallel. Edit .liquid/.css/.js — browser auto-refreshes.
scripts-info.build: Production JS build: bundles assets/js/index.js → assets/js/glamour-pro.js (minified). Run before pack or to test the bundle.
scripts-info.pack: Release: production JS build + creates glamour-pro.zip (flat, upload-ready). Only ships: theme.json, layout.liquid, sections/, locales/, assets/css/*.css, assets/js/glamour-pro.js. Excludes preview/ local runtime state such as preview/state.json.
